creator: Martin.Birgmeier@aon.at
text:
There seems to be a regression in the stream editor sed(1) between 7.4 and 8.2. A test case is included, containing the script, example input, correct output, and incorrect output.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Run the test case using the command

    sed -f kill-svn-in-diff.sed test-input

and observe the output.
